case_title: VIOLETA GASITOI VS. MIGUEL ANGEL CASTILLO OLIVARES

docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF GASITOI, VIOLETA ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
REMARK: RETURN MAIL-ORDER OF DISMISSAL MAILED TO MIGUEL ANGEL CASTILLO OLIVARES-ATTEMPTED NOT KNOW/UNABLE TO FORWARD

REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY TELEPHONE (SMALL CLAIMS)- GRANTED FILED BY PLAINTIFF GASITOI, VIOLETA

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-08-2021 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-08-2021 BY MICHELLE TONG. PLAINTIFF VIOLETA GASITOI IS PRESENT VIA ZOOM ASSISTED BY COURT CERTIFIED ROMANIAN INTERPRETER RUTH HOLTZMAN WITH WITNESS DAUGHTER OF PLAINTIFF, ACTUAL DRIVER OF CAR. DEFENDANT MIGUEL ANGEL CASTILLO OLIVARES IS PRESENT ASSISTED BY COURT CERTIFIED SPANISH INTERPRETER MONICA HERNANDEZ. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PLAINTIFF STATED THAT SHE SENT IN EXHIBITS BUT D506 DID NOT RECEIVE, WE USED THE EXHIBITS SENT TO THE DEFENDANT . PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GASITOI, VIOLETA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT OLIVARES, MIGUEL ANGEL CASTILLO $1,710.17 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,710.17 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

REQUEST FOR ROMANIAN INTERPRETER FOR MAY 5, 2021 HEARING [REQUEST FORWARDED TO INTERPRETER DEPARTMENT] FILED BY PLAINTIFF GASITOI, VIOLETA

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF VIOLETA GASITOI IS NOT PRESENT, HOWEVER COURT CERTIFIED ROMANIAN INTERPRETER RUTH HOLTZMAN IS PRESENT. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT MIGUEL ANGEL CASTILLO OLIVARES WHO REQUESTED A SPANISH INTERPRETER. PLAINTIFF SUBMITTED A GRANTED REMOTE APPEARACE BUT WAS NOT ON ZOOM OR COURTCALL AT THE CALL OF THE CALENDAR. NO EXHIBITS SENT IN BY PLAINTIFF. COMMISSIONER PANG LY; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
